---
title: "example-make-workflow "
date: "2021"
date-format: "YYYY"
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: article
links:
  - url: "https://github.com/rgreminger/example-make-workflow"
    label: "GitHub"

# Add buttons by adding entries to the links list above. Each entry needs a url and a label.
# Below, write a brief explanation on the purpose of the code/repository. This is what will be displayed in the list.
---

GitHub repository providing a basic example for a GNU make pipeline to implement a reproducible research workflow.
